product_invariants.description: Vouch is a narrow commitment-backed payment coordination system for appointments and in-person agreements.
Both participants confirm presence inside the confirmation window before funds release.
If confirmation conditions fail, funds do not release; provider state determines non-capture, cancellation, or refund.
No disputes, evidence, appeals, mediation, arbitration, manual awards, support overrides, or manual confirmation rewrites.
Stripe owns payment truth; Vouch mirrors provider state and applies workflow truth.

manual_runtime_checks.description: Merchant can start Stripe Connect onboarding from canonical dashboard/new-vouch flow without visiting settings pages.
Customer can start Stripe payment management from canonical flow without visiting settings pages.
Merchant can create a committed/sent Vouch with immutable pricing and appointment window.
Customer can accept and Stripe creates a manual-capture PaymentIntent with destination transfer and app fee.
Both participants confirm inside the window and settlement captures only after Stripe retrieve confirms capturable state.
Missing or late confirmation causes non-capture/cancel/refund according to Stripe provider state.
Duplicate Stripe webhook event ID is acknowledged and does not re-run state transition.
